---
title: "Session 12: Project Work: QC the Gold Set & Baseline"
subtitle: "Day 4 · Methodology & Pipeline Assembly (4-3)"
format: revealjs
metadata-files:
  - _slides.yml
---

<!-- STUB DECK — structure only; content to be filled in before the course. -->

# Session 12: Project Work: QC the Gold Set & Baseline

## 📋 Agenda

- A quality-control (adjudication) pass on your sampled gold set
- Run a baseline prompt

## 🎯 Learning Objectives

By the end of this session, you will be able to:

<!-- to be added -->

# QC / adjudication pass

## QC / adjudication pass

<!-- to be added -->

# Run a baseline prompt

## Run a baseline prompt

<!-- to be added -->

# Any questions?
